user_query: Retrieve information about the NFT with the token ID 541 from the collection with the contract address 0x60e4d786628fea6478f785a6d7e704777c86a7c6. Also, get the real-time statistics and floor price of all collections.

TaskList.description: Retrieve information for the NFT with token ID 541 from the specified contract address.
Fetch real-time statistics for all NFT collections.
Get the floor price of all NFT collections.
